Class Waypoint

java.lang.Object
path.Waypoint
public class Waypoint extends Object
Represents a specific spatial coordinate on the game map used to define enemy navigation paths. * Each Waypoint acts as a node in a linear sequence that enemies follow. By utilizing the Point2D class, it provides high-precision floating-point coordinates necessary for smooth movement interpolation.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description

    Constructs a new Waypoint at the specified X and Y coordinates.

  • Constructor Details

    • Waypoint

      public Waypoint(double x, double y)
      Constructs a new Waypoint at the specified X and Y coordinates.
      Parameters:
      x - The horizontal position on the game map.
      y - The vertical position on the game map.

  • Method Details

    • getPosition

      public javafx.geometry.Point2D getPosition()
      Retrieves the position of this waypoint as a Point2D object.
      Returns:
      The Point2D representation of this coordinate.

    • setPosition

      public void setPosition(javafx.geometry.Point2D position)
      Updates the position of this waypoint.
      Parameters:
      position - The new Point2D coordinate.

    • getX

      public double getX()
      Helper method to retrieve the X-coordinate directly.
      Returns:
      The double value of the X-coordinate.

    • getY

      public double getY()
      Helper method to retrieve the Y-coordinate directly.
      Returns:
      The double value of the Y-coordinate.
